tasks.subject: Task 1: Minimap config fields
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `minimapEnabled`, `minimapCorner`, and `minimapSize` to the mod config, plus the `MinimapCorner` enum.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/main/java/com/craftycorvid/improvedmaps/config/ModConfig.java`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- minimapEnabled/minimapCorner/minimapSize fields with defaults
- MinimapCorner enum with 4 corners
- Gson round-trips enum by name; existing loadConfig backfills new keys

**Verify:** `./gradlew build` -> BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/java/com/craftycorvid/improvedmaps/config/ModConfig.java"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fields with defaults", "MinimapCorner enum", "Gson round-trips enum"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Minimap HUD element
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A client HUD element that tracks the last-held atlas and renders its active map in the configured corner.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/client/java/com/craftycorvid/improvedmaps/MinimapHud.java`
- Modify: `src/client/java/com/craftycorvid/improvedmaps/ImprovedMapsClient.java`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Registered via HudElementRegistry.addLast
- Hidden when disabled/hideGui/no-atlas/no-mapid/no-data
- Last-held atlas tracking (hand -> remembered slot -> first in inventory -> none)
- Drawn at minimapSize (clamped 16-512), 8px margin, configured corner, decorations included

**Verify:** `./gradlew build` -> BUILD SUCCESSFUL; manual in-game is user's call.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/client/java/com/craftycorvid/improvedmaps/MinimapHud.java", "src/client/java/com/craftycorvid/improvedmaps/ImprovedMapsClient.java"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["HudElementRegistry.addLast", "hidden when disabled/hideGui/no-data", "last-held tracking", "drawn in configured corner with decorations"]}
```
